about_me.p1: I'm a multimedia designer, that enjoys combining art and programming to create cute, playful and interactive websites. I design UI elements, stickers, animations, and illustrations.
about_me.p2: I am currently studying Multimedia Design at Zealand Academy. In my free time, I enjoy drawing and building websites.

ul.a: Card memory game with my illustrations of characters

experience.p1: For over 5 years, I have been creating illustrations, designs, and web projects as a freelancer. During this time, I have worked on logos, illustrations, short animations, website graphics, and small web projects, adapting each project to the client's needs and goals.
experience.p2: In addition to creative projects, I have experience working in other fields, which has helped me develop responsibility, organizational skills, and the ability to work effectively in a team.

dl.dt: Design Intern • PVM Reklame • March 2025 - August 2025
dl.dd: Designed print materials such as posters, business cards, and other promotional products, prepared print-ready files, and collaborated with team members throughout the production process.

dl.dt: Sales Assistant Intern • Normal A/S • October 2023 - March 2024
dl.dd: Assisted with product restocking and store organization, maintained an appealing shopping environment, worked closely with colleagues, and provided customer service when needed.

education.p1: I began my journey with a degree in Design and Printing, where I developed skills in graphic design, print production, and visual communication.
education.p2: After moving to Denmark, I decided to deepen my knowledge of web development and completed a website development course. This allowed me to expand my skills in front-end development and digital product creation.
education.p3: I am currently studying Multimedia Design, where I combine my knowledge of design and web development to create modern digital solutions.

dl.dt: Bachelor's Degree in Multimedia Design • Zealand - Sjællands Erhvervsakademi • September 2025 - Present
dl.dd: Developing skills in multimedia design, UI/UX, web design, and digital communication. Working with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Bootstrap to create interactive content and user-centered digital solutions.

dl.dt: Web Developer • HackYourFuture Denmark • January 2025 - September 2025
dl.dd: Completed a hands-on web development program focused on building web applications with Next.js. Learned to use Git and GitHub for version control and collaboration, worked on real-world projects, and strengthened problem-solving and analytical thinking skills.

dl.dt: Bachelor's Degree in Design and Printing • Kharkiv National University of Radio Electronics • September 2019 - August 2023
dl.dd: Gained knowledge of graphic design, print production, and visual communication. Worked with Adobe Photoshop and Adobe Illustrator, created layouts, and prepared files for professional printing.

alts: New Years art-collaboration with another artist. Nadiia and Maha are watching the TV under the christmas tree in New Years night.
